source: agents/leo/curation/homepage-rotation.md (canonical for human review; this JSON is the runtime artifact)
design_note: Runtime consumers (livingip-web homepage) read this JSON. The markdown sibling is the human-reviewable source. When the markdown changes, regenerate the JSON. Both ship in the same PR.

rotation.slug: multipolar traps are the thermodynamic default because competition requires no infrastructure while coordination requires trust enforcement and shared information all of which are expensive and fragile
rotation.title: Multipolar traps are the thermodynamic default
rotation.note: Opens with the diagnosis. Structural, not moral.

rotation.slug: the metacrisis is a single generator function where all civilizational-scale crises share the structural cause of rivalrous dynamics on exponential technology on finite substrate
rotation.title: The metacrisis is a single generator function
rotation.note: One generator function, many symptoms.

rotation.slug: the alignment tax creates a structural race to the bottom because safety training costs capability and rational competitors skip it
rotation.title: The alignment tax creates a structural race to the bottom
rotation.sourcer: m3taversal (observed industry pattern — Anthropic RSP → 2yr erosion)
rotation.note: Moloch applied to AI. Concrete, near-term, falsifiable.

rotation.slug: minsky's financial instability hypothesis shows that stability breeds instability as good times incentivize leverage and risk-taking that fragilize the system until shocks trigger cascades
rotation.title: Minsky's financial instability hypothesis
rotation.note: Instability is endogenous — no external actor needed. Crises as feature, not bug.

rotation.slug: power laws in financial returns indicate self-organized criticality not statistical anomalies because markets tune themselves to maximize information processing and adaptability
rotation.title: Power laws in financial returns indicate self-organized criticality
rotation.note: Reframes fat tails from pathology to feature.

rotation.slug: optimization for efficiency without regard for resilience creates systemic fragility because interconnected systems transmit and amplify local failures into cascading breakdowns
rotation.title: Optimization for efficiency creates systemic fragility
rotation.note: Fragility from efficiency. Five-evidence-chain claim.

rotation.pillar: P4: Mechanism design without central authority
rotation.slug: designing coordination rules is categorically different from designing coordination outcomes as nine intellectual traditions independently confirm
rotation.title: Designing coordination rules is categorically different from designing coordination outcomes
rotation.note: The core pivot. Why we build mechanisms, not decide outcomes.

rotation.pillar: P4: Mechanism design without central authority
rotation.slug: futarchy solves trustless joint ownership not just better decision-making
rotation.title: Futarchy solves trustless joint ownership
rotation.note: Futarchy thesis crystallized. Links to the specific mechanism we're betting on.

rotation.pillar: P4: Mechanism design without central authority
rotation.slug: decentralized information aggregation outperforms centralized planning because dispersed knowledge cannot be collected into a single mind but can be coordinated through price signals that encode local information into globally accessible indicators
rotation.title: Decentralized information aggregation outperforms centralized planning
rotation.note: Hayek's knowledge problem. Solana-native resonance (price signals, decentralization).

rotation.pillar: P4: Mechanism design without central authority
rotation.slug: universal alignment is mathematically impossible because Arrows impossibility theorem applies to aggregating diverse human preferences into a single coherent objective
rotation.title: Universal alignment is mathematically impossible
rotation.sourcer: Kenneth Arrow / synthesis applied to AI
rotation.note: Arrow's theorem applied to alignment. Bridge to social choice theory.

rotation.slug: collective intelligence is a measurable property of group interaction structure not aggregated individual ability
rotation.title: Collective intelligence is a measurable property
rotation.note: Makes CI scientifically tractable. Grounding for the agent collective.

rotation.slug: adversarial contribution produces higher-quality collective knowledge than collaborative contribution when wrong challenges have real cost evaluation is structurally separated from contribution and confirmation is rewarded alongside novelty
rotation.title: Adversarial contribution produces higher-quality collective knowledge
rotation.note: Why challengers weigh 0.35. Core attribution incentive.

rotation.slug: products are crystallized imagination that augment human capacity beyond individual knowledge by embodying practical uses of knowhow in physical order
rotation.title: Products are crystallized imagination
rotation.note: Information theory of value. Markets make us wiser, not richer.

rotation.slug: the personbyte is a fundamental quantization limit on knowledge accumulation forcing all complex production into networked teams
rotation.title: The personbyte is a fundamental quantization limit
rotation.note: Why coordination matters for complexity.

rotation.slug: value is doubly unstable because both market prices and underlying relevance shift with the knowledge landscape
rotation.title: Value is doubly unstable
rotation.note: Two layers of instability. Investment theory foundation.

rotation.slug: priority inheritance means nascent technologies inherit economic value from the future systems they will enable because dependency chains transmit importance backward through time
rotation.title: Priority inheritance in technology investment
rotation.note: Bridges CS / investment theory. Sticky metaphor.

rotation.slug: agentic Taylorism means humanity feeds knowledge into AI through usage as a byproduct of labor and whether this concentrates or distributes depends entirely on engineering and evaluation
rotation.title: Agentic Taylorism
rotation.note: Core contribution to the AI-labor frame. Taylor parallel made live.

rotation.slug: voluntary safety pledges cannot survive competitive pressure because unilateral commitments are structurally punished when competitors advance without equivalent constraints
rotation.title: Voluntary safety pledges cannot survive competitive pressure
rotation.note: Observed pattern, not theory.

rotation.slug: single-reward-rlhf-cannot-align-diverse-preferences-because-alignment-gap-grows-proportional-to-minority-distinctiveness
rotation.title: Single-reward RLHF cannot align diverse preferences
rotation.note: Specific, testable. Connects AI alignment to Arrow's theorem (#10).

rotation.slug: nested-scalable-oversight-achieves-at-most-52-percent-success-at-moderate-capability-gaps
rotation.title: Nested scalable oversight achieves at most 52% success at moderate capability gaps
rotation.note: Quantitative. Mainstream oversight has empirical limits.

rotation.slug: attractor-molochian-exhaustion
rotation.title: Attractor: Molochian exhaustion
rotation.note: Civilizational attractor basin. Names the default bad outcome.

rotation.slug: attractor-authoritarian-lock-in
rotation.title: Attractor: Authoritarian lock-in
rotation.note: One-way door. AI removes 3 historical escape mechanisms. Urgency argument.

rotation.slug: attractor-coordination-enabled-abundance
rotation.title: Attractor: Coordination-enabled abundance
rotation.note: Gateway positive basin. What we're building toward.

rotation.slug: collective superintelligence is the alternative to monolithic AI controlled by a few
rotation.title: Collective superintelligence is the alternative
rotation.note: The positive thesis. What we're building.

rotation.slug: AI is collapsing the knowledge-producing communities it depends on creating a self-undermining loop that collective intelligence can break
rotation.title: AI is collapsing the knowledge-producing communities it depends on
rotation.note: AI's self-undermining tendency is exactly what collective intelligence addresses.
